name: superlazy
description: Token-minimal coding skills for Codex and ChatGPT: terse user output, targeted context use, TDD, debugging, review, verification, repomaps, and context indexing.

interface.longDescription: Superlazy bundles coding skills that keep user-facing output terse while preserving quality disciplines such as TDD, root-cause debugging, review, verification, isolated worktrees, repo maps, and lossless context indexing.
defaultPrompt: Use $superlazy while making this code change.
Use $ultralazy to minimize tokens while preserving quality.
